envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Recommendations are PROPOSED_NOT_APPROVED. ADR-0081 5-stage maturity governs workflow activation.

items.name: Workflow Map Recommendation
items.description: Ranks proposed Workflow Map regions per ADR-0081 5-stage maturity. Stage 1 (template) + Stage 2 (recommendation) regions rank first; Stages 3-5 require explicit policy review.
items.human_readable_summary: Proposes Stage 1 + Stage 2 workflows first. Stage 3-5 progression requires explicit admin policy review + per-call governance.
items.model_usage_notes: Use ADR-0081 stage labels. Template-only + recommendation-only workflows are safe defaults. Proposed-Action + governed execution + continuous-optimization stages must surface as REQUIRES_ADMIN_REVIEW at minimum.

ranked_regions.rationale_summary: Recommendations surface to humans; admin approval defines surface scope.
Proposed-Action requires admin policy approval per ADR-0081.
Safe-fallback documented per workflow; HIGH confidence because they require no connector activation.
Risky writes mandatory dual-control per ADR-0026 regardless of stage.

items.rationale: Stages 1-2 are safe; Stages 3-5 require explicit admin review. Safe-fallback paths always available even without connectors. Dual-control workflows enforced regardless of stage.
cross_map_dependencies: Workflow Map depends on Role Map (workflow participants are role-shaped)
Workflow Map depends on Tool Map (workflows compose against approved tools)
Workflow Map depends on Authority Map (approval gates draw from authority chains)
Workflow Map depends on Risk Map (high-risk workflows blocked)
items.approval_gate_required: Admin policy approval at D4 + per-call governance for Stage 3+ per ADR-0081.
DMW_scope_implications: Workflow Map bounds workflow-scoped DMW provenance per ADR-0081
Approval-gate workflows constrain Authority Map DMW scope downstream
Safe-fallback workflows operate without connector DMW provenance
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every workflow stage progression
Workflow Stages 3-5 require Foundation governance authorization + per-call approval
Dual-control mandatory for risky writes regardless of stage
Workflow purpose binding required at activation
